creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I'm holding further commits because the updated girara port is failing to download it's distfile from cluster machines. Distfile can be downloaded successfully elsewhere, I'm still unsure what's the matter.

Ref: http://beefy6.nyi.freebsd.org/data/103amd64-default/431713/logs/girara-0.2.7.log
